title: Mission to the Taco Space Station
summary: A daring spaceship mission ventures into the far reaches of space. Chief Engineer Isabella leads a crew—including a brave fox and bear assistants Mercury and Nercury—as they navigate shipboard fires, orbital maneuvers, and medical emergencies. The mission takes a tasty turn when they discover a floating space station that spells out "TACOS" on its sensors. After docking to enjoy square and triangle-shaped delicacies, the crew continues their deep-space exploration, eventually encountering the mysterious Mama Ship and its captain. Through mechanical repairs and first-aid rescues, the crew proves that no problem is too "long" to solve.

highlightQuote.text: Hello, we're coming... we're coming to the place where we get our tacos. I want a square-shaped taco, please... with sprinkles on it, okay?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, are you ready for the countdown? Have a seat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what's that part for? Is that part of the spaceship too?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, it's a sound effects machine.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A sound effects machine? Okay, let's put it by our console here with the other sound effects machine and the keyboard.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay, Dad, put this stuff on our spaceship.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Come on, Elliot. Oh, she's not sure if she can come in because of the door. Open the door for Elliot and welcome her.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Open!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hey Dad, come. Put... put your things on the space map.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, we're setting up the space map up there now?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Because I want it to all be flat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I see, so it can all be flat. I like that idea. What about this? That could be your space chair. You could sit on that for our mission.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, you can sit in that chair.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I'll sit in the big blue chair. Actually, where's Jane going to sit?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Actually, I'm going to sit in the big blue chair and you can sit on the stool.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. And Fox, you can sit in my lap. And bears, you stay in your tape roll on the table. And the bears say, "Aye aye, Captain! Aye aye, Captain!" They're good crew members, those little bears.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, Chief Engineer Isabella, are you ready for takeoff?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, let's do our countdown and then we'll make the big blast-off sound. We'll start from ten, ready? Are you going to use the music machine too?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm just reaching up to my space...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Yep, press the keys to start the countdown sequence.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, we're starting at ten. Ready? Ten, nine, eight, seven, six, five... countdown with me, please... four, three, two, one, blast off!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what was that dinging sound?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was one of our baby rocks!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was one of our baby rocks! We're blasting off, baby rocks. Oh my gosh, there's an alarm sound! What does it mean, Chief Engineer Isabella?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: There's a fire!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: There's a fire! Oh no, a fire on the ship! What are we going to do? Fox, can you fix our problem? There's a fire on the ship. Fox says, "Yes, I'll put out the fire, I just need to find the hose, but what did I do with it?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, I think I have a hose.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Where... where is that hose? Oh, we can use that! The pump! We can pump some water up with it and squirt it out on the fire.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the fire's going out! Just a little more. Ah, thank goodness. We put out the fire. Good work, everyone. And now our spaceship is floating in orbit around the Earth.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now I'm going to get the special trinket in case anyone falls out of the rocket and gets hurt.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Who fell out of the rocket ship and got hurt?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh my gosh, ah, bonk, bonk! Both of the little tiny bears fell out! Are you hurt, little bears? "I think I'm okay, I think I scraped my knee," says one bear. Oh, better do some first aid. Do you need a band-aid, little bear? "Maybe, I don't know."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I got this set and I have a kit. And I have one band-aid.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Little bear, we're going to put a band-aid on you, okay? There. Now, remember the little bears' names are Mercury and Nercury, is that right?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, Nercury, you're getting the band-aid.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, and Nercury says, "Oh, it hurts, I need a kiss!" Who's going to give Nercury a kiss?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, but I just put a band-aid on you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Nercury says, "Thank you." Oh, why are you tapping me like that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, because I want to get you really great.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I'm feeling better already. Then Mercury says, "I'll give you a kiss! Mwah!" What are you doing with that screwdriver?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I did your first aid.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Thank you, says the bears.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Latched it up, yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Phew, that was two emergencies in a row, says Fox. We did a really good job putting out that fire and rescuing our two bear crew members, Nercury and Mercury, and everyone's feeling better. Good job, Chief Engineer Isabella.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But there's going to be a long problem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: There's going to be what?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A long, long, long, long problem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what's that sound, says Fox.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's there... there's something... in the ship...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, there's something approaching our spaceship from the outside. Let's look at it on our screen. Hmm, what do you see on the screen? Oh, it's small but it's getting bigger and getting closer and wait a minute, it has a little sign written on the outside. What does that say, Captain Daddy? Oh, it says T-A-C-O-S. What does that spell?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Where... where is the sign?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, it's imaginary. I'm looking at it on the imaginary screen inside our spaceship. It's a floating space station with a sign, and it's a word that starts with T, and there's a little picture of some food next to it. T-A-C-O-S. That spells Tacos! Maybe we should land there on the Taco Space Station. Should we go there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, we have to radio them a message to say we're coming to land.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I could just call them on my phone. Hello, we're coming... we're coming to the place where we get our tacos. I want a square-shaped taco, please... with sprinkles on it, okay?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, we'll get your order ready for you and a parking space for your spaceship. Over and out.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I want to pick out my shape. I want it...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, we're coming in for a landing at the Taco Space Station. K-plunk! Okay, we're parked. Now we can get out of our spaceship and go out into the Taco Space Station and see if they have our food ready already.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They got the food ready.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Tacos! I got my tacos. Fox, which kind would you like? I'll order it in.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, thank you, says Fox. I would like a round taco, please.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'll call it up on the phone. And what do you want on top of that?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Um, a traffic cone, please.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Not a traffic cone!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oops, no, um, I would like a pinecone, please. Or maybe a carrot. Or maybe an apple. I like all kinds of tacos.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hello, I want a... one with olives and water with that.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, we'll get that ready for you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I got all of this stuff.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We have a special spaceship back. Dad, which kind would you like?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I would like a triangle taco, please, with the letter S on it.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Coming right up. Where's the letter S, Dad?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Um, now I see there's a letter S on the floor. It's one of these letters. Can you tell which one it is?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Not A, not Y, not L... this is S.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That is S, you're right.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What would you like on top?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: On top of that, um, a carrot, please. A triangle-S-carrot taco, that looks delicious.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let's put it in our special... on our special plate.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hey Fox, what would you like with that pie?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, a pie! Oh, a pie for dessert sounds amazing. Yes, please.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ordering a pie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Thank you. And then everybody needs drinks too. What do we have for drinks?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Here's some soda that we can just have.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, delicious. Thank you, that's perfect. Wow, this Taco Space Station is the best.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now let's go fly.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, let's get back in our spaceship.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We have to have a special button. It's going to be a great button. A go button.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A go button, oh, okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: This is go because it's green. That's stop.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, it's green for go, yeah.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Go!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, press the go button and we'll blast off with our rocket ship from the space station. Do you want to do the countdown from three, say three, two, one?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: No? Should I do it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Three, two, one, okay, press the button. Blast off! We blasted off again. And now where are we going on our spaceship?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I got three tacos. We're going to space.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, we're going further out into space.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, let me get buckled in first.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yeah, you've got to get buckled in, Isabella.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I got a bunch of tacos for us.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That's good to have the tacos on the way, because we don't want to get too hungry on our space mission.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Stop! Zoom, zoom, zoom...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Where are we zooming to now, Captain Isabella?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We're going further in space. Oh, who wants a taco?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, I'll have one, says Fox. Thank you. Mmm, that was a delicious taco. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Um, I'll have one, says Daddy. Mmm, thank you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I want the square one. Fox, you get two.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, you got another.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, another taco for me! Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I got that. It's crunchy!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Another spaceship is coming! It's the Mama Ship! The Mama Ship is coming in for a landing with Captain Averybug flying the ship. Captain Avery is flying.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hey Dad, there's something floating toward us.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: There's another ship! Let's send a message over the radio to them. What are you going to say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But this is not a ship.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hey, there's an emergency, Fox! Can you fix it? Fox, something broke! Our space table broke, just one little dent.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Our space table is broken! It's an emergency, we'd better fix it. Just one little crack right here. Chief Engineer Isabella, could you please get out the tools to fix the space table?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But those are not tools, they're first aid.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that is the first aid kit. That's how we gave first aid to Nercury and Mercury, the two bears.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Do you have an ouchie or an allergy?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Um, I have an allergy.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, I could just have a little bit of first aid. You need a band-aid too.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I probably do, yeah, I think so.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: There were a lot of emergencies, but we handled them all.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let me see what's in the case.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, let's go see what Elliot's up to.

characters.name: Chief Engineer Isabella
characters.description: The mission's lead engineer who manages the spaceship's systems and medical emergencies.

characters.name: Captain Daddy
characters.description: The co-pilot and mission captain who assists Isabella in navigating the stars.

characters.name: Fox
characters.description: Behind a ceremonial mask and a playful sticker, this solitary navigator charts both the stars and the thicket, serving as a forest inhabitant who provides directions in exchange for a breakfast of flowers and juice. A steadfast ritualist and fire-extinguisher, they toll the iconic bell for the nibbler while finding more solace in space tacos than the decadent elixirs brewed in their honor. Whether navigating the heavy void or the woodland path, they remain a wise neighbor of cosmic perspective, pointedly advising seekers that the path to clarity begins with a simple bath. Bound to the chime that draws the visitor, they are a figure of quiet contrast—a guide who understands that the weight of destiny is best balanced by the essential purities of the everyday.

characters.name: Mercury
characters.description: A small bear crew member who survived falling out of the rocket ship.

characters.name: Nercury
characters.description: A small bear crew member who required a band-aid and a kiss after an injury.

characters.name: Elliot
characters.description: A guest invited on board the spaceship who enters through the special door.

characters.name: Captain Averybug
characters.description: The pilot of the Mama Ship who meets the crew during their journey.

places.name: Spaceship
places.description: The crew’s primary vessel centers on a command bridge where ergonomic chairs face a panoramic window and a console projecting a specialized space map. Integrated sound machines provide auditory depth to the mission’s operations, echoing through a sleek interior lined with high-tech books. Outfitted with a dexterous robot arm for harvesting geological specimens and a reinforced storage bay for space rocks, the craft serves as both a high-tech laboratory and a long-term home, seamlessly blending the grit of deep-space exploration with a sanctuary for advanced scholarship.

places.name: Earth
places.description: The ancestral cradle of humanity and the definitive anchor for the galactic mission, this rocky world pulses with a hidden molten core. As the home planet where the journey begins and ends, it serves as the foundational site for the Floofers’ true home and new school, bridging an ancient legacy with the education of a new generation.

places.name: Taco Space Station
places.description: A floating station that serves customized tacos in various shapes to hungry travelers.

places.name: Mama Ship
places.description: A secondary spacecraft that encounters the main crew in deep space.
